title: Accenture stock falls after earnings beat expectations but revenue outlook was below forecasts
text: Shares of Accenture PLC ACN, -0.67% slumped 3.2% in premarket trading Tuesday, after the management consultant reported fiscal first-quarter earnings that beat expectations but provided a less than stellar full-year profit outlook. Net income for the quarter to Nov. 30 edged up to $1.98 billion, or $3.10 a share, from $1.97 billion, or $3.08 a share, in the year-ago period.
